use_codes.desc: TO IMPROVE GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN PATIENTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS

USE AS A MONOTHERAPY, IN COMBINATION WITH A SULFONYLUREA, METFORMIN OR INSULIN OR IN COMBINATION WITH A SULFONYLUREA PLUS METFORMIN TO IMPROVE GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN PATIENTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS
FIRST LINE THERAPY FOR TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS
